<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Metadata\Parser; /** * Attribute information is static within a single PHP process. * It is therefore okay to use a Singleton registry here. * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class Registry { private static ?Parser $instance = null; public static function parser(): Parser { return self::$instance ?? self::$instance = self::build(); } private static function build(): Parser { return new CachingParser(new AttributeParser); } }
